question_text: Two bar magnets are placed with their north poles facing each other. What will happen?

options.label: A
options.text: They will attract each other strongly

options.label: C
options.text: They will have no effect on each other

options.label: D
options.text: They will attract then repel alternately

correct_answer: B) They will repel each other
explanation: Like magnetic poles repel each other, so two north poles facing each other will push away from one another. Unlike poles (north and south) attract instead.
